case_title: PORTILLO, MARITZA et al VS SHUYING, JIANG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-28-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-18-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT FAILURE TO APPPEAR. CASE CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHUYING, JIANG PLTF'S ARE NOT THE REGISTERED OWNERS OF THE SUBJECT VEHICLE AND ARE THEREFORE PRECLUDED FROM RECOVERING FOR ITS DAMAGES. AS TO THOSE PLTF'S. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PORTILLO, MARITZA CURIEL, JUAN AS TO DEFENDANT SHUYING, JIANG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHUYING, JIANG
